Push SELECT + Up for 1st 10 Enemies 1 HP (1-hit kill)
Push SELECT + DOWN for 1st 10 Enemies 0 MP
Push SELECT + RIGHT for 1st 10 Enemies 0 HP
Push SELECT + LEFT for 1st 10 enemies Immobilize
Push R + Up for All Enemies 1 HP (1-hit kill)
Push R + DOWN for All Enemies 0 MP
Push R + RIGHT for All Enemies 0 HP
Push R + LEFT for All Enemies Immobilize
